name: YApi
description: Open-source visual API management platform originated at Qunar (去哪儿); widely used across Chinese enterprises.

seo.title: YApi — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: YApi: Open-source visual API management platform originated at Qunar (去哪儿); widely used across Chinese enterprises.

when_to_use: Open-source API management and documentation platform
Visual API workflow tool popular in Chinese enterprises
Self-hosted API collaboration for internal dev teams
Mock server generation from API spec definitions
API design documentation with Chinese enterprise support

pros: Visual editor for API specs, low ramp-up
Built-in mock server for frontend teams
Popular in Chinese enterprises, proven at scale
cons: Primary docs and community are Chinese-only
UI feels dated compared to Apifox or Postman
review.verdict: Free self-hosted API platform that works, but stagnant development and language barrier push most teams to Apifox.
review.best_for: Chinese-speaking teams needing a free self-hosted API mocking and docs platform
review.not_for: English-first teams or anyone needing active upstream maintenance and modern OpenAPI support
